title: С418 Music
description: I've added music from musician C418 to minecraft.
body: my mod adds new records with music created by the iconic composer C418 to the Minecraft game world. These new music disks will diversify your gaming experience by adding new tunes and atmosphere to your Minecraft world. many tunes are already present in the game as background music. my mod allows you to listen to them regardless of when the background music is playing.
